Description: Test Scenario
Expected Result: Expected Result

Description: Display new service "Register as Voluntary Contributor"
Precondition: User has access to service list
Steps: 1. Open application 2. Navigate to service list
Expected Result: Service "Register as Voluntary Contributor" appears in list

Description: Show registration form only for eligible users
Precondition: User meets eligibility (Saudi, age 18‑65, inactive contributor)
Expected Result: Registration form loads

Description: Display popup for ineligible user
Precondition: User does not meet eligibility (e.g., non‑Saudi or age <18)
Expected Result: Popup message appears with appropriate validation message

Description: Load purpose of registration list from backend
Expected Result: Dropdown shows options: Freelancer, Establishment owner, Annuity upgrading, Annuity eligibility

Description: Validate purpose selection based on contribution months
Precondition: User with ≥300 months (annuity upgrade) or <300 months (annuity eligibility)
Expected Result: System allows appropriate purpose or shows ineligibility message

Description: Highlight eligible wage based on last engagement
Expected Result: Only eligible wages are highlighted; non‑eligible wages are disabled/grayed out

Description: Selecting ineligible wage triggers eligibility reason
Expected Result: System displays eligibility reason from backend

Description: Wage update for each year activates in January of next year
Precondition: Current date before Jan of next year
Steps: Attempt to update wage for next year
Expected Result: Update is disabled before Jan; after Jan becomes enabled

Description: Display health record checkbox list
Expected Result: List of checkbox questions is displayed

Description: Selecting “yes” on any medical item routes to workflow
Precondition: User checks any health question as Yes
Expected Result: Transaction status set to “Workflow” (pending doctor review)

Description: No “yes” selection results in auto‑approve
Precondition: User leaves all health questions unchecked
Expected Result: Request is auto‑approved

Description: Disclaimer must be accepted to proceed
Expected Result: System shows error requiring acceptance of disclaimer

Description: Freelancer type must upload document
Expected Result: System prompts to upload freelancer document

Description: Upload required document for freelancer
Expected Result: Upload successful, proceed to next step

Description: Preview request before submission
Expected Result: Review screen displays all entered details

Description: Successful submission shows confirmation with request ID
Expected Result: Confirmation message with unique request ID displayed

Description: Failed submission displays error from backend
Expected Result: Error message from backend shown

Description: Validation message for age under 18
Expected Result: Message: “Person is less than 18 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC.”

Description: Validation message for age over 65
Expected Result: Message: “Person is more than 65 years of age, cannot be registered as a VIC.”

Description: Validation message for active engagement with GOSI
Expected Result: Message: “Person has an active engagement with GOSI, cannot be registered as a VIC.”

Description: Validation message for non‑matching NIC
Expected Result: Message: “No match found with NIC.”

Description: Validation message for deceased person
Expected Result: Message: “Person is deceased, cannot be added as a VIC.”

Description: Validation message for government employee
Expected Result: Message: “Person is a Government employee, cannot be registered as a VIC.”

Description: NIC service down shows error after three attempts
Expected Result: Message: “NIC service is down, please try later.”

Description: Purpose dropdown localized based on language
Expected Result: Options displayed in Arabic
